summary: Made surgical seam edits to carry chapter 6's laundry-return residue into the opening and to sharpen Nita's closing resistance to managed, service-tier replacement before chapter 8.
edits: Added a warm-towels callback in the opening to link back to the prior chapter's laundromat return.
Changed the early 'By the time' setup to a different temporal phrasing for cleaner opening variation.
Added a single closing sentence framing Nita's resistance to having 'out' returned as a service.
